CustomField.description: Priority bucket for grouping work items in the delivery timeline (NOW / NEXT / PLANNED / PROPOSED / HOLD). When blank, the deliveryProFormaTimeline LWC derives the bucket at render time from PriorityPk__c + StageNamePk__c. Users can set this field directly to override the derived value for edge cases.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Leave blank to auto-derive the bucket from Priority + Stage. Set explicitly to override (e.g. a Backlog item that is actually top-priority because the client said so).
CustomField.label: Priority Group
